title: Quarter
description: Quarter is a shader pack that will turn your entire Minecraft world into a small, rectangle in the corner of your screen.
body:
# Quarter
Ever dreamt of playing Minecraft in a miniature world, tucked away in the corner of your screen? The Quarter Shader Pack makes that dream a reality, transforming your entire Minecraft environment into a captivating, small rectangle.

![Preview of the shader pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Pt8n1A1B/images/27323d94cbcb8e91d9e7e78a2a28449196bdb1a6.png)
